data.title: WiMi Hologram Cloud Increases Stake in MicroAlgo to 67.65%
data.description:
WiMi Hologram Cloud ( (WIMI) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 27, 2025, WiMi Hologram Cloud Inc. announced it has increased its equity stake in MicroAlgo Inc. to 67.65% by holding a significant number of Class A and Class B ordinary shares. To stabilize market expectations, WiMi has committed to a ten-year lock-up period for these shares, indicating a long-term strategic investment in MicroAlgo. This move is likely to strengthen WiMi’s position in the industry and reassure stakeholders of its commitment to MicroAlgo’s future.

More about WiMi Hologram Cloud

WiMi Hologram Cloud, Inc. (NASDAQ: WIMI) operates an integrated holographic AR application platform in China, boasting a comprehensive and diversified holographic AR content library. The company, which began commercial operations in 2015, has developed a portfolio of 4,654 AR holographic contents and achieved an image processing speed 80 percent faster than the industry average.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $73.66M

data.title: Air China Reports 2024 Financial Results Amid Rising Costs
data.description:
Air China ( (HK:0753) ) has issued an announcement.

Air China reported its 2024 annual financial results, revealing a revenue of RMB166,699 million but a net loss of RMB233 million attributable to equity shareholders. The company decided not to distribute profits for the year. Despite an increase in revenue compared to 2023, the airline faced higher operating expenses, notably in jet fuel and employee compensation costs, contributing to the loss. The financial results highlight ongoing challenges in the aviation industry, impacting Air China’s profitability and strategic decisions.

More about Air China

Air China is a major airline company based in the People’s Republic of China, operating within the aviation industry. The company provides passenger and cargo air transportation services and is a key player in the Chinese and international aviation markets.

data.title: Shougang Fushan Resources Group Announces Final Dividend for 2024
data.description:
Shougang Fushan Resources Group Limited ( (HK:0639) ) has shared an update.

Shougang Fushan Resources Group Limited announced a final cash dividend of HKD 0.21 per share for the financial year ending December 31, 2024. This decision reflects the company’s financial performance and commitment to providing returns to its shareholders, with the dividend payment scheduled for July 24, 2025.

More about Shougang Fushan Resources Group Limited

Shougang Fushan Resources Group Limited operates in the resources industry, focusing primarily on the production and sale of coal products. The company is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and is involved in various aspects of coal mining and processing.

data.title: Zhenro Services Group Reports Stable Revenue but Increased Losses in 2024
data.description:
Zhenro Services Group Limited ( (HK:6958) ) has provided an announcement.

Zhenro Services Group Limited reported stable revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024, with a slight increase in property management services revenue but declines in other service areas. Despite maintaining stable revenue, the company experienced a significant increase in losses, attributed to a decrease in gross profit and other financial challenges, prompting the decision not to recommend a final dividend for the year.

More about Zhenro Services Group Limited

Zhenro Services Group Limited operates in the property management industry, offering a range of services including property management, value-added services to non-property owners, community value-added services, and commercial operational management. The company primarily focuses on property management services, which constitute the largest portion of its revenue.

data.title: Banyan Gold Launches Extensive Drilling Program at AurMac Project
data.description:
Banyan Gold ( (TSE:BYN) ) just unveiled an update.

Banyan Gold Corp. has commenced a fully funded 30,000+ metre diamond drilling program at its AurMac Project in Yukon, targeting the expansion and definition of mineralized zones in the Airstrip and Powerline deposits. The 2025 strategic drill program aims to build on the high-grade intersections from 2024, with a focus on near-surface gold mineralization and testing new regional targets. This initiative is expected to enhance the company’s resource base and potentially improve its market positioning within the gold exploration sector.

More about Banyan Gold

Banyan Gold Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold exploration and development. The company is primarily engaged in the exploration of its AurMac Project located in the Tombstone Gold Belt, Yukon, aiming to expand and define mineralized zones through extensive drilling programs.

data.title: Maris-Tech Secures $4 Million Credit Line for Strategic Growth
data.description:
Maris-Tech Ltd. ( (MTEK) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 26, 2025, Maris-Tech Ltd. entered into a $4 million credit line agreement with United Mizrahi-Tefahot Bank Ltd., secured against all company assets. This credit facility, lasting 12 months, is expected to enhance Maris-Tech’s strategic flexibility and commercial activity without shareholder dilution, reflecting the bank’s trust in the company.

More about Maris-Tech Ltd.

Maris-Tech Ltd. is a global leader in video and AI-based edge computing technology, offering intelligent video transmission solutions. Their products, known for being miniature, lightweight, and low-power, are designed for high-performance capabilities including raw data processing and AI-driven analytics. The company serves leading manufacturers worldwide in sectors such as defense, aerospace, intelligence gathering, homeland security, and communications.

data.title: Above Food Faces Nasdaq Compliance Challenge Amid Strategic Restructuring
data.description:
Above Food Ingredients ( (ABVE) ) has provided an announcement.

Above Food Ingredients Inc. announced on March 26, 2025, that it received a notice from Nasdaq due to a delay in filing its Form 6-K for the period ending July 31, 2024. This delay was attributed to the positive impacts expected from a recent strategic restructuring and successful fundraising, which have improved the company’s financial position by reducing debt and moving towards profitability. The company has 60 days to submit a compliance plan to Nasdaq, and if accepted, it may have until July 30, 2025, to regain compliance. The notice does not immediately affect the listing of the company’s shares on Nasdaq.

More about Above Food Ingredients

Above Food Ingredients Inc. is a leader in sustainable, vertically integrated food systems, focusing on delivering nutritious and flavorful ingredients with transparency. The company emphasizes traceability and sustainability in its operations, leveraging advanced technologies such as AI-driven genomics and agronomy to enhance its plant protein offerings.

data.title: KWG Living Group Reports 2024 Financial Loss Amid Revenue Decline
data.description:
An update from KWG Living Group Holdings Limited ( (HK:3913) ) is now available.

KWG Living Group Holdings Limited reported its annual results for the year ending December 31, 2024, showing a revenue of approximately RMB3,573.5 million, a 7.2% decrease from the previous year. The company experienced a significant decline in gross profit by 25.3% and reported a loss of RMB558.7 million, marking a reversal from the profit recorded in 2023. This downturn reflects challenges in the company’s operational efficiency and market conditions, impacting its financial performance and potentially affecting stakeholders’ confidence.

More about KWG Living Group Holdings Limited

KWG Living Group Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily engaged in property management and related services. The company operates within the real estate industry, focusing on managing residential and commercial properties.
